---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r, include = FALSE}
library(glydraw)

readme_cartoon_examples <- list(
  list(
    file = "man/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-2-1.png",
    glycan = paste0(
      "Glc(a1-2)Glc(a1-3)Glc(a1-3)Man(a1-2)Man(a1-2)Man(a1-3)[Man(a1-2)Man(a1-3)",
      "[Man(a1-2)Man(a1-6)]Man(a1-6)]Man(b1-4)GlcNAc(b1-4)GlcNAc(a1-"
    ),
    args = list(red_end = "PP-Dol")
  ),
  list(
    file = "man/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-3-1.png",
    glycan = paste0(
      "Neu5Ac(a2-3)Gal(b1-3)[Fuc(a1-2)Gal(b1-3)[Fuc(a1-4)]GlcNAc(b1-3)",
      "[Gal(b1-4)[Fuc(a1-3)]GlcNAc(b1-6)]Gal(b1-4)GlcNAc(b1-6)]GalNAc(a1-"
    ),
    args = list(red_end = "~", node_size = 1.2)
  ),
  list(
    file = "man/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-4-1.png",
    glycan = "Gal(b1-3)[Neu5Ac(a2-3)Gal6S(b1-4)[Fuc(a1-3)]GlcNAc(b1-6)]GalNAc(a1-",
    args = list(orient = "V", red_end = "Ser/Thr")
  ),
  list(
    file = "man/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-5-1.png",
    glycan = "Fuc(a1-3)[Fuc(a1-6)]GlcNAc(b1-",
    args = list(orient = "V", red_end = "Asn", fuc_orient = "up")
  ),
  list(
    file = "man/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-6-1.png",
    glycan = paste0(
      "WURCS=2.0/3,4,3/[a2122h-1a_1-5_2*N][a1122h-1a_1-5_2*OP^XOCCN/3O/3=O]",
      "[a1122h-1a_1-5_6*OP^XOCCN/3O/3=O]/1-2-3-3/a4-b1_b6-c1_c2-d1"
    ),
    args = list()
  ),
  list(
    file = "man/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-7-1.png",
    glycan = paste0(
      "Glc(b1-4)[Xyl(a1-6)][Xyl(a1-2)]Glc(b1-4)[Xyl(a1-6)]Glc(b1-4)",
      "[Fuc(a1-2)Gal(b1-2)Xyl(a1-6)]Glc(b1-4)Glc(b1-4)[Xyl(a1-6)]Glc(b1-"
    ),
    args = list(fuc_orient = "up")
  )
)

readme_cartoon_examples <- purrr::map(readme_cartoon_examples, function(example) {
  cartoon <- do.call(draw_cartoon, c(list(example$glycan), example$args))
  save_cartoon(cartoon, example$file)
  example$width <- attr(cartoon, "glydraw_size_px")[["width"]]
  example
})

readme_display_scale <- min(
  1,
  850 / max(purrr::map_dbl(readme_cartoon_examples, "width"))
)

readme_img <- function(index) {
  example <- readme_cartoon_examples[[index]]
  width <- round(example$width * readme_display_scale)
  html <- glue::glue('<img src="{example$file}" width="{width}" />')
  knitr::asis_output(html)
}
```

# glydraw <a href="https://glycoverse.github.io/glydraw/"><img src="man/figures/logo.png" align="right" height="138" /></a>

<!-- badges: start -->

[![Lifecycle: experimental](https://img.shields.io/badge/lifecycle-experimental-orange.svg)](https://lifecycle.r-lib.org/articles/stages.html#experimental)
[![CRAN status](https://www.r-pkg.org/badges/version/glydraw)](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=glydraw)
[![R-universe version](https://glycoverse.r-universe.dev/glydraw/badges/version)](https://glycoverse.r-universe.dev/glydraw)
[![R-CMD-check](https://github.com/glycoverse/glydraw/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/glycoverse/glydraw/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)
[![Codecov test coverage](https://codecov.io/gh/glycoverse/glydraw/graph/badge.svg)](https://app.codecov.io/gh/glycoverse/glydraw)

<!-- badges: end -->

`glydraw` is a ggplot2-native R engine for drawing reproducible SNFG glycan cartoons from glycan structure objects or text notations,
with support for batch export, structural highlighting, and deep appearance customization.

## Installation

### Install glycoverse

We recommend installing the meta-package [glycoverse](https://github.com/glycoverse/glycoverse),
which includes this package and other core glycoverse packages.

### Install glydraw alone

If you don't want to install all glycoverse packages, you can only install glydraw.

You can install the latest release of glydraw from CRAN:

``` r
install.packages("glydraw")
```

Or from [r-universe](https://glycoverse.r-universe.dev/glydraw):

```r
install.packages('glydraw', repos = c('https://glycoverse.r-universe.dev', 'https://cloud.r-project.org'))
```

Or from [GitHub](https://github.com/glycoverse/glydraw):

``` r
remotes::install_github("glycoverse/glydraw@*release")
```

Or install the development version:

``` r
remotes::install_github("glycoverse/glydraw")
```

## Example

``` r
library(glydraw)

glycan <- paste0(
  "Glc(a1-2)Glc(a1-3)Glc(a1-3)Man(a1-2)Man(a1-2)Man(a1-3)[Man(a1-2)Man(a1-3)",
  "[Man(a1-2)Man(a1-6)]Man(a1-6)]Man(b1-4)GlcNAc(b1-4)GlcNAc(a1-"
)
draw_cartoon(glycan, red_end = "PP-Dol")
```

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
readme_img(1)
```

``` r
glycan <- paste0(
  "Neu5Ac(a2-3)Gal(b1-3)[Fuc(a1-2)Gal(b1-3)[Fuc(a1-4)]GlcNAc(b1-3)",
  "[Gal(b1-4)[Fuc(a1-3)]GlcNAc(b1-6)]Gal(b1-4)GlcNAc(b1-6)]GalNAc(a1-"
)
draw_cartoon(glycan, red_end = "~", node_size = 1.2)
```

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
readme_img(2)
```

``` r
glycan <- "Gal(b1-3)[Neu5Ac(a2-3)Gal6S(b1-4)[Fuc(a1-3)]GlcNAc(b1-6)]GalNAc(a1-"
draw_cartoon(glycan, orient = "V", red_end = "Ser/Thr")
```

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
readme_img(3)
```

``` r
glycan <- "Fuc(a1-3)[Fuc(a1-6)]GlcNAc(b1-"
draw_cartoon(glycan, orient = "V", red_end = "Asn", fuc_orient = "up")
```

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
readme_img(4)
```

``` r
glycan <- paste0(
  "WURCS=2.0/3,4,3/[a2122h-1a_1-5_2*N][a1122h-1a_1-5_2*OP^XOCCN/3O/3=O]",
  "[a1122h-1a_1-5_6*OP^XOCCN/3O/3=O]/1-2-3-3/a4-b1_b6-c1_c2-d1"
)
draw_cartoon(glycan)
```

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
readme_img(5)
```

``` r
glycan <- "Glc(b1-4)[Xyl(a1-6)][Xyl(a1-2)]Glc(b1-4)[Xyl(a1-6)]Glc(b1-4)[Fuc(a1-2)Gal(b1-2)Xyl(a1-6)]Glc(b1-4)Glc(b1-4)[Xyl(a1-6)]Glc(b1-"
draw_cartoon(glycan, fuc_orient = "up")
```

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
readme_img(6)
```
